category_sources: source_facts.description says it is for Gerrit code reviews; official Go package docs say it works with Git repositories and Gerrit code review.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is git-codereview; official Go package page is golang.org/x/review/git-codereview.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Go package documentation page for golang.org/x/review/git-codereview.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/golang/review, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Gerrit code reviews; official package docs describe a command-line interface for Git and Gerrit review workflows.
